name: ca-certificates-java
title: ca-certificates-java
description:
Common CA certificates (JKS keystore)
This package uses the hooks of the ca-certificates package to update the
cacerts JKS keystore used for many java runtimes.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ca-certificates-java because Common CA certificates (JKS keystore).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ca-certificates-java as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ca-certificates-java with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ca-certificates-java --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
